requirement_topic.en: Iraq MoE / COSQC Grid-Connection Standards — Anti-Islanding (IEC 62116), IEC 61727, and 50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 伊拉克电力部 / COSQC并网标准——防孤岛（IEC 62116）、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: 伊拉克電力部 / COSQC併網標準——防孤島（IEC 62116）、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V參數

summary.en: Iraq's grid operates at 50 Hz, single-phase 230 V, three-phase 400 V (IEC 60038 standard voltages). The Ministry of Electricity (MoE) oversees grid connection; large-scale solar projects (including TotalEnergies, PowerChina, and Masdar-led tenders) reference IEC technical specifications in their procurement documents. Key requirements for PV inverters include: (1) IEC 62116 anti-islanding — inverters must detect loss of mains and disconnect within the standard's prescribed detection window; (2) IEC 61727 — characteristics of the utility interface for PV systems, specifying voltage and frequency operating ranges and protection settings for Iraq's 50 Hz grid; (3) firmware and protection relay settings validated for Iraq's 230/400 V, 50 Hz nominal parameters. Iraq's grid suffers chronic instability — frequent outages, voltage fluctuations, and frequency deviations — making wide operating-range firmware and robust protection critical. Many installations operate as hybrid or off-grid systems with diesel/generator backup, requiring inverter specifications to explicitly cover hybrid operating modes and generator compatibility.
summary.zh: 伊拉克电网运行参数为50 Hz、单相230 V、三相400 V（IEC 60038标准电压）。电力部（MoE）负责并网监管；大型太阳能项目（包括道达尔能源、中国电力和马斯达尔主导的招标）在其采购文件中引用IEC技术规格。光伏逆变器的主要要求包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤岛——逆变器须在标准规定的检测时间窗内检测电网失电并断开；（2）IEC 61727——光伏系统公用事业接口特性，规定伊拉克50 Hz电网的电压和频率运行范围及保护整定；（3）针对伊拉克230/400 V、50 Hz额定参数验证的固件和保护继电器整定。伊拉克电网长期存在不稳定问题——频繁停电、电压波动和频率偏差——使宽运行范围固件和强健保护至关重要。许多装置以混合或离网方式运行，配备柴油/发电机备用，要求逆变器规格明确涵盖混合运行模式和发电机兼容性。
summary.zht: 伊拉克電網運行參數為50 Hz、單相230 V、三相400 V（IEC 60038標準電壓）。電力部（MoE）負責併網監管；大型太陽能項目（包括道達爾能源、中國電力和馬斯達爾主導的招標）在其採購文件中引用IEC技術規格。光伏逆變器的主要要求包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤島——逆變器須在標準規定的偵測時間窗內偵測電網失電並斷開；（2）IEC 61727——光伏系統公用事業接口特性，規定伊拉克50 Hz電網的電壓和頻率運行範圍及保護整定；（3）針對伊拉克230/400 V、50 Hz額定參數驗證的韌體和保護繼電器整定。伊拉克電網長期存在不穩定問題——頻繁停電、電壓波動和頻率偏差——使寬運行範圍韌體和強健保護至關重要。許多裝置以混合或離網方式運行，配備柴油/發電機備用，要求逆變器規格明確涵蓋混合運行模式和發電機相容性。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures (referenced in MoE / project procurement specifications)
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface (operating range and protection settings for 50 Hz grid)
IEC 60038 — IEC standard voltages (230 V single-phase, 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz — Iraq nominal grid)
IEC 62109-1/-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems (referenced in major project tenders)

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System, applicable to utility-scale PV via 10 kV and above), NB/T 32004 (inverter technical specifications), and domestic anti-islanding test results. These Chinese grid-connection documents are based on Chinese grid conditions and are not automatically accepted as equivalent under COSQC conformity requirements or Iraq MoE / project procurement specifications. The key parameter difference is voltage: China's grid standard is 220/380 V at 50 Hz under GB/T 156, whereas Iraq's nominal grid is 230/400 V at 50 Hz per IEC 60038. While the frequency is the same (50 Hz), firmware protection thresholds and reconnection delays validated for Chinese 220/380 V conditions must be re-parameterised and documented for Iraq's 230/400 V nominal values and its wider real-world voltage operating envelope due to grid instability.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定，适用于通过10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏电站）、NB/T 32004（逆变器技术规范）及国内防孤岛测试结果。上述中国并网文件基于中国电网条件，不被COSQC合格要求或伊拉克电力部/项目采购规格自动接受为等效依据。主要参数差异在于电压：中国电网标准依据 GB/T 156 为220/380 V 50 Hz，而伊拉克额定电网依据IEC 60038为230/400 V 50 Hz。虽然频率相同（50 Hz），但针对中国220/380 V条件验证的固件保护阈值和重连延迟须重新参数化并记录，以适应伊拉克230/400 V额定值及因电网不稳定而形成的更宽实际运行电压范围。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定，適用於通過10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏電站）、NB/T 32004（逆變器技術規範）及國內防孤島測試結果。上述中國併網文件基於中國電網條件，不被COSQC合格要求或伊拉克電力部/項目採購規格自動接受為等效依據。主要參數差異在於電壓：中國電網標準依據 GB/T 156 為220/380 V 50 Hz，而伊拉克額定電網依據IEC 60038為230/400 V 50 Hz。雖然頻率相同（50 Hz），但針對中國220/380 V條件驗證的韌體保護閾值和重連延遲須重新參數化並記錄，以適應伊拉克230/400 V額定值及因電網不穩定而形成的更寬實際運行電壓範圍。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 156 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages — China: 220/380 V at 50 Hz)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not automatically satisfy COSQC conformity requirements or Iraq MoE / project procurement specifications. Exporters must prepare: (a) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (b) IEC 61727 utility interface compliance evidence; (c) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic emission compliance evidence; (d) firmware protection threshold documentation validated for Iraq's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid — not the 220/380 V Chinese grid parameters. Additionally, for installations in Iraq's unstable grid environment: (e) inverter wide-range input/output tolerance specifications must cover the actual voltage and frequency deviations observed on the Iraq grid; (f) for hybrid systems, explicit documentation of generator-sync and transfer-switch compatibility is required. Where inverter firmware settings differ from the factory default for China, re-parameterisation must be documented and, if material, retested under the applicable IEC standard.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T并网文件不能自动满足COSQC合格要求或伊拉克电力部/项目采购规格。出口商须准备：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62116防孤岛测试报告；（b）IEC 61727公用事业接口合规证据；（c）IEC 61000-3-2谐波排放合规证据；（d）针对伊拉克230/400 V、50 Hz电网验证的固件保护阈值文件，而非中国220/380 V电网参数。此外，对于伊拉克不稳定电网环境中的装置：（e）逆变器宽范围输入/输出耐受规格须涵盖伊拉克电网实际观测到的电压和频率偏差；（f）对于混合系统，须提供发电机同步和转换开关兼容性的明确文件。若逆变器固件设置与中国出厂默认设置不同，须记录重新参数化过程，如变更重要，应依据适用IEC标准重新测试。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T併網文件不能自動滿足COSQC合格要求或伊拉克電力部/項目採購規格。出口商須準備：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62116防孤島測試報告；（b）IEC 61727公用事業接口合規證據；（c）IEC 61000-3-2諧波排放合規證據；（d）針對伊拉克230/400 V、50 Hz電網驗證的韌體保護閾值文件，而非中國220/380 V電網參數。此外，對於伊拉克不穩定電網環境中的裝置：（e）逆變器寬範圍輸入/輸出耐受規格須涵蓋伊拉克電網實際觀測到的電壓和頻率偏差；（f）對於混合系統，須提供發電機同步和轉換開關相容性的明確文件。若逆變器韌體設置與中國出廠預設設置不同，須記錄重新參數化過程，如變更重要，應依據適用IEC標準重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connection and project-tender equipment compliance under Iraq MoE requirements and COSQC conformity regime; anti-islanding and grid parameter validation are non-negotiable gates in IEC-aligned project procurement
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China's grid operator requirements but does not automatically transfer to Iraq COSQC / MoE grid-connection acceptance

source.publisher: COSQC (Central Organization for Standardization and Quality Control), Iraq

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Iraq's nominal grid is 230/400 V at 50 Hz; COSQC conformity and MoE / project procurement requirements reference IEC standards including IEC 62116 and IEC 61727. Chinese GB/T grid certificates do not automatically satisfy these requirements. Re-parameterise inverter firmware for Iraq's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid before testing and document the configuration. For hybrid installations, explicitly document generator-sync and transfer-switch compatibility. Verify current COSQC Technical Regulations, IQS standards adoption, and project-specific MoE requirements directly with COSQC (cosqc.gov.iq) and the Ministry of Electricity (moelc.gov.iq) before finalising the equipment compliance package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 伊拉克额定电网为230/400 V 50 Hz；COSQC合格评定和电力部/项目采购要求引用IEC标准，包括IEC 62116和IEC 61727。中国GB/T并网证书不能自动满足上述要求。测试前须将逆变器固件重新参数化为伊拉克230/400 V 50 Hz电网参数，并记录配置。对于混合系统，须明确记录发电机同步和转换开关兼容性。在最终确定设备合规包前，请直接向COSQC（cosqc.gov.iq）和电力部（moelc.gov.iq）核实现行COSQC技术法规、IQS标准采纳状况及项目特定电力部要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 伊拉克額定電網為230/400 V 50 Hz；COSQC合格評定和電力部/項目採購要求引用IEC標準，包括IEC 62116和IEC 61727。中國GB/T併網證書不能自動滿足上述要求。測試前須將逆變器韌體重新參數化為伊拉克230/400 V 50 Hz電網參數，並記錄配置。對於混合系統，須明確記錄發電機同步和轉換開關相容性。在最終確定設備合規包前，請直接向COSQC（cosqc.gov.iq）和電力部（moelc.gov.iq）核實現行COSQC技術法規、IQS標準採納狀況及項目特定電力部要求。

requirement_topic.en: Iraq MoE Large-Scale Solar Tenders — IEC-Aligned Procurement Specifications and COSQC Pre-Shipment Inspection
requirement_topic.zh: 伊拉克电力部大型太阳能招标——IEC对齐采购规格及COSQC装运前检查
requirement_topic.zht: 伊拉克電力部大型太陽能招標——IEC對齊採購規格及COSQC裝運前檢查

summary.en: Iraq's Ministry of Electricity has issued large-scale solar PV tenders, with major projects involving TotalEnergies, PowerChina, and Masdar referencing IEC technical specifications for equipment procurement. COSQC operates Iraq's conformity assessment and pre-shipment inspection regime: imported goods subject to COSQC Technical Regulations require a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) obtained through a COSQC-authorised inspection body before shipment. For solar PV inverters, the relevant conformity pathway requires: (a) assessment against applicable Iraqi Standards (IQS) — which align with or adopt IEC standards — or accepted IEC test evidence; (b) pre-shipment inspection conducted by a COSQC-authorised body in the country of export; (c) submission of conformity documentation to Iraqi Customs for clearance. The exact IQS standards applicable to PV inverters and the current COSQC product scope should be verified directly with COSQC, as the regulated product list is updated periodically.
summary.zh: 伊拉克电力部已发布大型太阳能光伏招标项目，道达尔能源、中国电力和马斯达尔参与的主要项目在设备采购文件中引用IEC技术规格。COSQC负责伊拉克的合格评定和装运前检查制度：受COSQC技术法规约束的进口商品须在装运前通过COSQC授权的检验机构取得合格证书（CoC）。对于太阳能光伏逆变器，相关合格评定途径要求：（a）依据适用伊拉克标准（IQS）——与IEC标准对齐或采用IEC标准——或认可的IEC测试证据进行评估；（b）在出口国由COSQC授权机构进行装运前检查；（c）向伊拉克海关提交合格评定文件以通关。适用于光伏逆变器的具体IQS标准和现行COSQC产品范围应直接向COSQC核实，因受监管产品清单会定期更新。
summary.zht: 伊拉克電力部已發布大型太陽能光伏招標項目，道達爾能源、中國電力和馬斯達爾參與的主要項目在設備採購文件中引用IEC技術規格。COSQC負責伊拉克的合格評定和裝運前檢查制度：受COSQC技術法規約束的進口商品須在裝運前通過COSQC授權的檢驗機構取得合格證書（CoC）。對於太陽能光伏逆變器，相關合格評定途徑要求：（a）依據適用伊拉克標準（IQS）——與IEC標準對齊或採用IEC標準——或認可的IEC測試證據進行評估；（b）在出口國由COSQC授權機構進行裝運前檢查；（c）向伊拉克海關提交合格評定文件以通關。適用於光伏逆變器的具體IQS標準和現行COSQC產品範圍應直接向COSQC核實，因受監管產品清單會定期更新。

standards_or_laws: COSQC pre-shipment inspection regime — Certificate of Conformity (CoC) for regulated imports (cosqc.gov.iq)
IQS (Iraqi Standards) — aligned with or adopting IEC standards for PV inverters
IEC 62109-1/-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems (referenced in MoE / major project procurement specifications)
IEC 62116 — Anti-islanding test procedure (referenced in IEC-aligned project procurement)
Iraq Ministry of Electricity (MoE) tender specifications — moelc.gov.iq

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent pre-shipment inspection regime for exported PV inverters. Chinese export documentation for PV inverters typically includes GB/T 37408-2021 or NB/T 32004 test certificates from CNAS-accredited laboratories, CQC/CGC voluntary certification, and customs export declarations. These Chinese export documents are not automatically accepted as COSQC conformity evidence in Iraq. Chinese exporters supplying inverters to Iraq MoE tenders or the general import market must obtain COSQC-recognised conformity certification — either through IEC test evidence assessed by a COSQC-authorised body, or by demonstrating compliance with the applicable IQS standards.
summary.zh: 中国对于出口光伏逆变器没有直接对应的装运前检查制度。中国光伏逆变器出口文件通常包括来自CNAS认可实验室的GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004测试证书、CQC/CGC自愿认证及海关出口申报。上述中国出口文件不被伊拉克COSQC自动接受为合格证据。向伊拉克电力部招标或一般进口市场供应逆变器的中国出口商须取得COSQC认可的合格认证——通过由COSQC授权机构评估的IEC测试证据，或证明符合适用的IQS标准。
summary.zht: 中國對於出口光伏逆變器沒有直接對應的裝運前檢查制度。中國光伏逆變器出口文件通常包括來自CNAS認可實驗室的GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004測試證書、CQC/CGC自願認證及海關出口申報。上述中國出口文件不被伊拉克COSQC自動接受為合格證據。向伊拉克電力部招標或一般進口市場供應逆變器的中國出口商須取得COSQC認可的合格認證——通過由COSQC授權機構評估的IEC測試證據，或證明符合適用的IQS標準。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese inverters destined for Iraq must go through COSQC pre-shipment inspection conducted by a COSQC-authorised body in China before export. Chinese GB/T or NB/T certificates alone are not sufficient for COSQC conformity. Exporters should: (a) identify the applicable IQS standards for PV inverters from COSQC (cosqc.gov.iq); (b) obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence and IEC 62116 anti-islanding test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (c) engage a COSQC-authorised inspection body in China to conduct pre-shipment inspection and issue the CoC; (d) review project tender documents for MoE or IPP-specific equipment compliance requirements, which may impose additional specifications beyond the baseline COSQC import requirement.
gap.zh: 差距：发往伊拉克的中国逆变器须在出口前由中国境内COSQC授权机构进行装运前检查。仅凭中国GB/T或NB/T证书不足以满足COSQC合格要求。出口商应：（a）向COSQC（cosqc.gov.iq）确认适用于光伏逆变器的IQS标准；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据和IEC 62116防孤岛测试证据；（c）委托中国境内COSQC授权检验机构进行装运前检查并签发CoC；（d）审查电力部或IPP的项目招标文件，其中可能规定超出基础COSQC进口要求的额外设备合规要求。
gap.zht: 差距：發往伊拉克的中國逆變器須在出口前由中國境內COSQC授權機構進行裝運前檢查。僅憑中國GB/T或NB/T證書不足以滿足COSQC合格要求。出口商應：（a）向COSQC（cosqc.gov.iq）確認適用於光伏逆變器的IQS標準；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據和IEC 62116防孤島測試證據；（c）委託中國境內COSQC授權檢驗機構進行裝運前檢查並簽發CoC；（d）審查電力部或IPP的項目招標文件，其中可能規定超出基礎COSQC進口要求的額外設備合規要求。

mandatory_status.target: COSQC pre-shipment inspection and CoC are mandatory for regulated product imports into Iraq; IEC alignment is required for MoE and major project tender equipment compliance
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese export certificates (GB/T, NB/T, CQC/CGC) are issued under China's domestic framework and are not automatically accepted as COSQC conformity evidence for Iraq import

source.publisher: COSQC (Central Organization for Standardization and Quality Control), Iraq

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] COSQC pre-shipment inspection is a mandatory import gate for regulated products in Iraq — Chinese GB/T or NB/T certificates alone do not satisfy this requirement. Engage a COSQC-authorised inspection body in China, prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 and IEC 62116 test evidence, and verify the current regulated product scope and applicable IQS standards directly with COSQC (cosqc.gov.iq) and the Ministry of Electricity (moelc.gov.iq) before shipment. For project tenders, review the full equipment specification in the tender documents as MoE or project-owner requirements may exceed the baseline import conformity requirement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] COSQC装运前检查是伊拉克受监管产品进口的强制性门槛——仅凭中国GB/T或NB/T证书不满足此要求。请委托中国境内COSQC授权检验机构，准备IEC 62109-1/-2和IEC 62116测试证据，并在发货前直接向COSQC（cosqc.gov.iq）和电力部（moelc.gov.iq）核实现行受监管产品范围和适用IQS标准。对于项目招标，须审查招标文件中的完整设备规格，因电力部或项目业主要求可能超出基础进口合格评定要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] COSQC裝運前檢查是伊拉克受監管產品進口的強制性門檻——僅憑中國GB/T或NB/T證書不滿足此要求。請委託中國境內COSQC授權檢驗機構，準備IEC 62109-1/-2和IEC 62116測試證據，並在發貨前直接向COSQC（cosqc.gov.iq）和電力部（moelc.gov.iq）核實現行受監管產品範圍和適用IQS標準。對於項目招標，須審查招標文件中的完整設備規格，因電力部或項目業主要求可能超出基礎進口合格評定要求。
